name: Scale of Injustice
why: One of the strongest Legendary control relics in the game. Its powerful debuffs and battlefield control make it an excellent choice for every faction and a staple in many endgame lineups.
description: Summons the Scale of Injustice to judge enemies, inflicting powerful debuffs that weaken their combat effectiveness while creating opportunities for allied heroes. Its exceptional utility makes it a top-tier Legendary relic for both PvP and PvE.
